allow: Bash(mysql -u root -pdula1790@ -e "USE hardware_store; SHOW TABLES; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS seeded_products FROM products;")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total products: {d[\\"total\\"]}'\); [print\(f'  [{p[\\"id\\"]}] {p[\\"name\\"]} | {p[\\"quantity\\"]} {p[\\"unit\\"]} | Rs.{p[\\"price\\"]}'\) for p in d['products']]")
Bash(mysql -u root -pdula1790@ -e "USE hardware_store; SELECT b.name, b.discount, COUNT\(p.id\) AS products FROM brands b LEFT JOIN products p ON p.brand_id=b.id GROUP BY b.id;")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'  {b[\\"name\\"]:15} {b[\\"discount\\"]}% OFF  \({b[\\"product_count\\"]} products\)'\) for b in d['brands']]")
